name: HandleSocketPong
documentation:
Handles a {@code PONG} WebSocket frame, typically sent in response to a {@code PING}.

 @see HandleWeb

methods.name: disabled
methods.documentation: If {@code true}, disables this handler during discovery.

methods.name: passive
methods.documentation: If {@code true}, the handler will not publish a response to the {@code WebResponse} log.

methods.name: value
methods.documentation:
One or more path patterns this handler applies to (e.g. {@code /users}, {@code /accounts/{id}}, {@code /accounts/*/users}). If empty, the path is based on the {@link Path} annotation.

Patterns support literal path parts, {@code {name}} parameters, {@code {name:regex}} constrained parameters, and {@code *} wildcards. A non-final {@code *} matches within a single path segment, while a final {@code *} matches the rest of the path.
